'''yadhuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecogram|cecogram]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-dh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecogram|cecogram]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| yadhuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yædhizhith|yædhizhith]] || [[word:yædhizhij|yædhizhij]] || [[word:yædhizhish|yædhizhish]] || [[word:yædhizhi|yædhizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yadhudhuzhuth|yadhudhuzhuth]] || [[word:yadhudhuzhuj|yadhudhuzhuj]] || [[word:yadhudhuzhush|yadhudhuzhush]] || [[word:yadhudhuzhu|yadhudhuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yadhuzhuth|yadhuzhuth]] || [[word:yadhuzhuj|yadhuzhuj]] || [[word:yadhuzhush|yadhuzhush]] || [[word:yadhuzhu|yadhuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yadhufzhuth|yadhufzhuth]] || [[word:yadhufzhuj|yadhufzhuj]] || [[word:yadhufzhush|yadhufzhush]] || [[word:yadhufzhuf|yadhufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yadhuzhuthu|yadhuzhuthu]] || [[word:yadhuzhuju|yadhuzhuju]] || [[word:yadhuzhushu|yadhuzhushu]] || [[word:yadhuzhuku|yadhuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yadhuzhuth|yadhuzhuth]] || [[word:yadhuzhuj|yadhuzhuj]] || [[word:yadhuzhush|yadhuzhush]] || [[word:yadhuzhu|yadhuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yadhuzhuthul|yadhuzhuthul]] || [[word:yadhuzhujul|yadhuzhujul]] || [[word:yadhuzhushul|yadhuzhushul]] || [[word:yadhuzhukul|yadhuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yadhuzhuthuthu|yadhuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:yadhuzhujuju|yadhuzhujuju]] || [[word:yadhuzhushushu|yadhuzhushushu]] || [[word:yadhuzhuku|yadhuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yadhuzhuthun|yadhuzhuthun]] || [[word:yadhuzhujun|yadhuzhujun]] || [[word:yadhuzhushun|yadhuzhushun]] || [[word:yadhuzhukun|yadhuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yadhuzhuthuoro|yadhuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:yadhuzhujuoro|yadhuzhujuoro]] || [[word:yadhuzhushuoro|yadhuzhushuoro]] || [[word:yadhuzhukuoro|yadhuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
